name: assumption-archaeologist
description: Assumption Archaeologist — finds implicit, load-bearing assumptions baked into code and surfaces them as a living ASSUMPTIONS.md.

plugins.name: assumptions
plugins.description: Finds load-bearing implicit assumptions that were never written down and records them in a living ASSUMPTIONS.md with stable IDs and a status lifecycle. Provides /assumptions:search and /assumptions:verify. Command-driven — never auto-runs.
